title: Aswad (Round 6)
description: Face the Hajarul Aswad, raise your right hand, and say Bismillahi Allahu Akbar.

title: Tawaf (Round 6)
description: Read any doa or zikir until rukun yamani. one is provided here with the meaning.

title: Yamani (Round 6)
description: Between the Yemeni Corner and the Hajarul Aswad, recite: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan wa qina 'adhaban-nar.
